summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of 3 new features: Loading Screen, Parallax Dividers, and Blog Section. All 15 test cases passed. Loading screen appears with 'CONSTRUYE TU HOGAR' branding and fades out after ~2.4s. Two parallax dividers with fixed background images and translated text (EN/ES/AR). Blog section with 3 article cards including images, categories, dates, read times, and multi-language support.

issues: Minor React warning: 'Received %s for a non-boolean attribute' - non-critical, doesn't affect functionality

passed: TEST 1: Loading screen appears on page load with data-testid='loading-screen'
TEST 1a: Brand name 'CONSTRUYE TU HOGAR' visible on loading screen
TEST 2: Loading screen fades out and disappears after ~2.4 seconds
TEST 3a: Hero Carousel found at top of page
TEST 3b: Journey section found
TEST 3c: Parallax Divider 1 found with data-testid='parallax-divider-0'
TEST 3d: Parallax Divider 2 found with data-testid='parallax-divider-1'
TEST 3e: Blog Section found with data-testid='blog-section'
TEST 4a: 3 blog articles found with data-testid='blog-article-0/1/2'
TEST 4b: Article 0 has all required elements (image, category, date, read_time, title, read_more)
TEST 5: Parallax background-attachment: fixed working correctly
TEST 6a: Spanish translation working for Parallax 1 ('Construye Tu Casa de Ensueño')
TEST 6b: Spanish translation working for Blog section ('ÚLTIMAS PUBLICACIONES')
TEST 7a: Arabic translation working for Parallax 1 ('ابنِ منزل أحلامك')
TEST 7b: Arabic translation working for Blog section ('أحدث المقالات')
TEST 7c: RTL direction set correctly for Arabic (dir='rtl')
TEST 8a: Blog section has 4 scroll-reveal elements
TEST 8b: Parallax dividers have 2 scroll-reveal elements
TEST 9: No critical JavaScript console errors
TEST 10a: Parallax 1 is after Journey section
TEST 10b: Parallax 2 is after Parallax 1
TEST 10c: Blog is after Projects section
TEST 10d: Footer is after Blog section

loading_screen.details: Loading screen appears with animated logo, 'CONSTRUYE TU HOGAR' branding, and loading bar. Fades out after ~2.4 seconds.

parallax_divider_1.details: Height: 400px, background-attachment: fixed, image from Unsplash, text: 'Build Your Dream Home' with subtitle

parallax_divider_2.details: Height: 400px, background-attachment: fixed, different Unsplash image, text: 'Your Investment, Your Future'

blog_section.details: 3 article cards with images, categories (Cost Savings, Legal Guide, Market Trends), dates, read times, titles, excerpts, and Read More links

multi_language_parallax.details: EN: 'Build Your Dream Home', ES: 'Construye Tu Casa de Ensueño', AR: 'ابنِ منزل أحلامك'

multi_language_blog.details: EN: 'LATEST INSIGHTS', ES: 'ÚLTIMAS PUBLICACIONES', AR: 'أحدث المقالات'

scroll_reveal_animations.details: Blog section has 4 scroll-reveal elements, Parallax dividers have 2 scroll-reveal elements

page_layout_order.details: Hero (0px) -> Journey (1080px) -> Parallax1 (1986px) -> Prototypes -> Map -> Parallax2 (4393px) -> Projects (4793px) -> Blog (5635px) -> Footer (6435px)

test_credentials: No auth required for homepage testing
seed_data_creation: None - using static data and Unsplash images
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features (Loading Screen, Parallax Dividers, Blog Section) fully tested and working. Loading screen uses data-testid='loading-screen' and disappears after ~2.4s. Parallax dividers use data-testid='parallax-divider-0' and 'parallax-divider-1' with CSS background-attachment: fixed. Blog section uses data-testid='blog-section' with articles 'blog-article-0/1/2'. Language switcher is a button with 'EN' text in navbar. Cookie banner may appear - dismiss with 'Accept All'. Console shows minor React warning about non-boolean attribute (non-critical).
